person.name: John de Châlon Count of Chalon

nameForms.fullText: John de Châlon Count of Chalon

sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - JEAN "l'Antique/le Sage" d'Auxonne (1190-30 Aug 1267, bur Abbaye de Bourguignon-lès-la Charité, Haunte-Saône).

Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - JEAN [I] d'Auxonne "l'Antique/le Sage", son of ETIENNE [III] Comte d’Auxonne & his first wife Béatrice Ctss de Chalon (1190-30 Aug 1267, bur Abbaye de Bourguignon-lès-la Charité, Haunte-Saône).

zh.lifeSummary: John de Châlon Count of Chalon是Etienne de Auxonne和Beatrix de Châlon的兒子，出生在法國芒內。他於從1242年到1243年與Isabelle de Courtenay結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1267年10月7日在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈隆-素-薩o，埋葬在法國福朗-可特艾豪-薩o布爾吉農-利斯-拉-加利特艾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John de Châlon Count of Chalon是Etienne de Auxonne和Beatrix de Châlon的儿子，出生在法国芒內。他于从1242年到1243年与Isabelle de Courtenay结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1267年10月7日在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈隆-素-薩o，埋葬在法国福朗-可特艾豪-薩o布爾吉農-利斯-拉-加利特艾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Châlon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: variant of   Whalen   (see   Whelan  ). Compare   Whallon  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: John de Châlon Count of Chalon was born in Marne, France as the son of Etienne de Auxonne and Beatrix de Châlon. He married Isabelle de Courtenay from 1242 to 1243. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 7 October 1267, in Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, and was buried in Bourguignon-lès-la-Charité, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: John de Châlon Count of Chalon est né à Marne, France, fils d’Etienne de Auxonne et Beatrix de Châlon. Il a épousé Isabelle de Courtenay du 1242 au 1243. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 7 octobre 1267, à Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, et a été enterré à Bourguignon-lès-la-Charité, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: John de Châlon Count of Chalon wurde in Marne, Frankreich, als Sohn von Etienne de Auxonne und Beatrix de Châlon geboren. Er hat von 1242 bis 1243 Isabelle de Courtenay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Oktober 1267 in Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich und wurde in Bourguignon-lès-la-Charité, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John de Châlon Count of Chalon è nato il nel Marne, Francia come figlio di Etienne de Auxonne e Beatrix de Châlon. Lui sposato Isabelle de Courtenay da 1242 a 1243. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 7 ottobre 1267, nel Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, e fu sepolto a Bourguignon-lès-la-Charité, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Châlon Count of ChalonはフランスマルンでEtienne de AuxonneとBeatrix de Châlonの息子として生まれた。から1242年まで1243年にIsabelle de Courtenayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1267年10月7日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーチャロン-スル-サoンで死去し，フランスフランチェ-コムトeハウテ-サoンボウルグイグノン-ルeス-ラ-チャーイトeにて埋葬された。

ko.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire,: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 쿠르텐아이
ko.lifeSummary: John de Châlon Count of Chalon(은)는 프랑스 마니에서 Etienne de Auxonne(와)과 Beatrix de Châlon의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1242년 부터 1243년 까지 Isabelle de Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1267년 10월 7일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 차론-수-사o니에서 사망했으며 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 하테-사o니 부르길뇰-e스-라-처이트e에 묻혔다.

pt.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire,: Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: John de Châlon Count of Chalon nasceu em Marne, França filho de Etienne de Auxonne e Beatrix de Châlon. Ele casou-se com Isabelle de Courtenay de 1242 a 1243. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de outubro de 1267, em Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, e foi sepultado em Bourguignon-lès-la-Charité, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: John de Châlon Count of Chalon родился в местности марн, Франция. Его родителей звали Etienne de Auxonne и Beatrix de Châlon. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle de Courtenay с 1242 по 1243. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 7 октября 1267 г. в местности халон-сур-саoн, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция и был похоронен в местности бургуигнон-лeс-ла-чаритe, хауте-саoн, фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: John de Châlon Count of Chalon nació en Marne, Francia como hijo de Etienne de Auxonne y Beatrix de Châlon. Se casó con Isabelle de Courtenay desde 1242 hasta 1243. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 7 de octubre de 1267, en Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, y fue sepultado en Bourguignon-lès-la-Charité, Haute-Saône, Franche-Comté, Francia.
